text: threat assessment: ambient stress markers elevated, seventeen percent above baseline, source: unknown

i am analyzing your tactical choices and i have concerns, but i will voice them later when less chaotic

mess hall secure, all exits catalogued, no immediate threats visible but i am continuing analysis
did you need something or are you here for strategic assessment purposes. i can provide both

i understand your concern about the AI system. i share it and i am monitoring it with increased rigor
